name: OneShot - The Barrens
description:
The... The Barrens I guess..

LOST SOUL AU

Honestly I do NOT like this area whatsoever-

Again, this was inspired by @Soz_the_pale-looking_guy 's OneShot bots, go follow that dude, they're a cool dude

Finally deciding to make bots again... I have a few ideas after this one, also the reason I haven't been posting is because of... Uhm... Uhhhh...

Dunno.

Either way I'll try to make more bots at some point

Lowkey though, this was the easiest of the locations to make, but also the most boring, have fun ig

Requested?

No.
creator: Rileys_Grass_Bed
